title: Attack on Titan: The Wings of Freedom
original_title: 劇場版「進撃の巨人」後編～自由の翼～
overview: As the Trost District is reclaimed from the Titans, Eren is taken under the wing of Captain Levi and his squad, who decide to try and teach him to master his mysterious abilities.
